prompt: Create a space research institute website with deep blue star fields, constellation navigation, 3D planet models, mission timeline interfaces, and real-time satellite data displays
prompt_refined: Generate a high-fidelity screenshot of a futuristic space research institute website interface. The background features deep blue star fields. In the central area, display a prominent, interactive 3D planet model. To the left, include a navigation panel with stylized constellation diagrams for navigation. On the right, incorporate real-time satellite data displays showing orbital paths, telemetry readouts, and holographic elements. At the bottom of the screen, place a sleek, horizontal mission timeline interface.
objects: futuristic space research institute website interface
prominent, interactive 3D planet model (in central area)
real-time satellite data displays (on the right)
sleek, horizontal mission timeline interface (at the bottom)
